Thanks for contributing to Bug-Free Travel Guides!
Choose the right template below and fill in the details.
All bug-free claims must be triple-sourced (3+ independent sources, at least 1 official/institutional).
All claims expire after 12 months — include a "last verified" date.
-->

### Issue Types

Select the template that best fits your contribution. Delete unused sections.
